nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 黄冠啄花鸟
nodes.summary: 黄冠啄花鸟（Yellow-crowned flowerpecker，学名 Dicaeum anthonyi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于國際自然保護聯盟，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括绿翅雁、Stubble quail、菲律賓鴉鵑等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.key: bird-黄冠啄花鸟-4925a9ae__distributed_in__loc-國際自然保護聯盟-2992ef64
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits tropical moist montane forest from 1,500 to 2,000 meters above sea level. The International Union for Conservation of Nature assessed this species in 2023 as Least-concern. Prior to this, it was assessed as near threatened with its population being estimated as 10,000 to 19,999 mature individuals

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It was formerly conspecific with the Flame-crowned flowerpecker of Mindanao. Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is becoming rare due to habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, forest loss is a threat especially in its lower altitude limits which are more prone to legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmland and road development
